fractionation method: subjecting concentrated ookinete culture supernatants to HPLC size exclusion chromatography
instrument: analyzed on an Orbitrap Fusion Mass Spectrometer
ionization type: Nanospray ionization was achieved by applying 2000V
labeling: Mass spectrometry analysis was carried out directly on the affinity pull-down chitin beads to identify the proteins present in the high molecular weight chitinase complex
reduction reagent: Reduction with DTT eliminated the high molecular mass P. falciparum chitinase-containing complex
